gate.exception: The 250 KB/1 MB target is not yet feasible while shipping the documented standalone CLI/MCP tooling plus Phase Q surfaces (doctor/plan/eval docs), the shared T02 atomic-preflight adapter, and the T03 change-map JSON Schema. T03 adds a bounded 1 KB cross-platform npm-pack allowance after CI measured 420257 bytes; source maps were removed in V04, and this exception must be reconsidered before ArkGate 4.
